title: codereview pass 2: select_channel fn and now() undefined in pseudocode
description: The updated pseudocode calls select_channel(ctx, metrics, now()) but no definition provided (only comment). now() also undefined. Link layer TDMA uses specific timing from lichen_tdma_init and SFN. Must add full pseudocode for select_channel to make normative. Also cross-ref to draft-lichen-tdma. P2. Also update vectors to include hash output test.
